use_cases: FAQ sections for customer support pages
Nested navigation menus in documentation sites
Collapsible settings panels in admin dashboards
Organizing long-form content into digestible sections
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible accordion component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth expand/collapse animations and a rotating chevron indicator. The component features keyboard navigation support and hover states for interactivity. Styled with Tailwind CSS for easy customization, it exports four composable sub-components: Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, and AccordionContent.
